urdu transliteration text: Aaj Rukhsat Ho Rhi Hai Tumse Zahra Ya Ali
english translation text: Tonight, Fatima Zahra departs from you, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text: Parda E Shab Mein Meri Mayyat Uthana Ya Ali
english translation text: Lift my body in the darkness of the night, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text: Pasliya Todi Gai Kaise Ye Batlaungi Mai
english translation text: How will I tell my Father that my ribs were broken!

urdu transliteration text: Hashr Ke Maidaa'n Mein Bhi Is Haal Mein Aaungi Mai
english translation text: I will arrive at the plains of the Day of Judgement in this state...

urdu transliteration text:
Haath Pehlu Se Na Tum Mera Hataana
Ya Ali
english translation text: Do not remove My hand from My injured side, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text: Aaj Rukhsat Ho Rhi Hai Tumse Zahra Ya Ali
english translation text: Tonight, Fatima Zahra departs from you, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text:
Wo Musibat Aap Ne Achcha Hua Dekhi Nahi
Ab Mai Sidhe Haath Se Tasbih Padh Sakti Nahi
english translation text: It was better that you did not witness that tragedy. Now I cannot do tasbih with my right hand!

urdu transliteration text: Aisa kunfuz Ne Hai Mara Taziyana Ya Ali
english translation text: Qunfuz struck me with the whip so severely, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text: Aaj Rukhsat Ho Rhi Hai Tumse Zahra Ya Ali
english translation text: Tonight, Fatima Zahra departs from you, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text:
Kehti Hai Zainab Ye Mujhse
Dekhkar Chehra Mera
english translation text: Seeing My face, Zainab says to Me

urdu transliteration text: Aapke Rukhsaar Par Ye Neel Hai Kaisa Pada
english translation text: How did You get that bruise on Your cheek?

urdu transliteration text:
Maine Khaya Hai Tamacha,
Mat Batana Ya Ali
english translation text: I have been slapped,but don’t mention, it O Ali!

urdu transliteration text: Aaj Rukhsat Ho Rhi Hai Tumse Zahra Ya Ali
english translation text: Tonight, Fatima Zahra departs from you, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text:
Taziyane Ki Aziyyat Ka Uthana Ek Taraf
Wo Tamache, Qatle MOHSIN, Dar Jalana Ek Taraf
english translation text: The pain from being whipped, the slaps, the death of Mohsin, the burning door all aside

urdu transliteration text:
Sabse Mushkil Tha Magar Darbaar Jana
Ya ALI
english translation text: Going to the court was the most difficult, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text: Aaj Rukhsat Ho Rhi Hai Tumse Zahra Ya Ali
english translation text: Tonight, Fatima Zahra departs from you, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Meri Talqeen Padhna Yaad Kar Lena Zara
Dar Ke Girne Se Mera Baazu Bhi Hai Toota Hua
english translation text: When you recite my Talqeen, please remember, my arm also broke when the burning door fell

urdu transliteration text: Mere Shano Ko Zara Dhire Hilana Ya Ali
english translation text: Shake My arms softly (for the talqeen), O Ali!

urdu transliteration text:
Chahe Aajaye Qayamat Mujhse Ye Waada Karo
Jab Talak Maula Mere Shabbir Ki Marzi Na Ho
english translation text: Promise Me, no matter what My Master, until My Shabbir does not agree…

urdu transliteration text: Tab Talak Mera Janaza Mat Uthana Ya Ali
english translation text: Do not begin My Funeral until then, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text:
Jab Se Aayi Hu Palat Kar Fikr Hai Mujhko Yehi
Mai To Parde Mein Gai Fir Bhi Zaeefa Ho Gayi
english translation text: Since I returned from the court, it bothers me. I went with my veil and it still took such a toll on me!

urdu transliteration text: Berida Darbaar Hai Zainab Ko Jana Ya Ali
english translation text: Zainab will have to go to the court unveiled, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text: Aaj Rukhsat Ho Rhi Hai Tumse Zahra Ya Ali
english translation text: Tonight, Fatima Zahra departs from you, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text:
Karbala Mein Jab Mere Mazloom Par Khanjar Chale
Pyaas K Aalam Me Wo Ghazi Ko Jab Aawaaz De
english translation text: When My oppressed son is sacrificed in Karbala and He calls for Abbas while He is thirsty

urdu transliteration text: Mai Bhi Aaungi Waha Par Tum Bhi Aana Ya Ali
english translation text: I will answer His call and so will You, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text: Aaj Rukhsat Ho Rhi Hai Tumse Zahra Ya Ali
english translation text: Tonight, Fatima Zahra departs from you, O Ali!

urdu transliteration text:
Haath Pehlu Par Rakhe Boli Takallum Fatima
Mai Dua Krti Hu Tum Aamin Keh Dena Zara
english translation text: Fatima said with a hand on Her injured side, I will pray and you respond with Ameen

urdu transliteration text: Jald Aaye Mere Mahdi Ka Zamana Ya Ali
english translation text: The era of my Mahdi (a.t.f.s) should come soon, O Ali!
